user.title: Connect to IthoWiFi add-on
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your IthoWiFi add-on. Authentication is only needed if API security is enabled on the device.

rf_source.title: RF Standalone — Select data source
rf_source.description: The add-on is in RF standalone mode. Select which tracked RF source to use for sensor data.

sensors.title: Select sensors ({device_type})
sensors.description: Choose which sensors and diagnostic items to include. You can change this later in the integration options.

remote_fans.title: RF and Virtual Remote devices ({device_type})
remote_fans.description: Optionally expose each configured RF send remote or virtual remote as its own fan entity, so you can control them individually from Home Assistant. This is in addition to the main fan entity. DemandFlow devices have all configured remotes pre-selected; other device types default to none. You can change this later in the integration options.

data.remote_fans: Remotes to expose as fan entities

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the device

init.title: Configure IthoWiFi
init.description: Select which sensors and diagnostic items to include, and which RF or virtual remotes to expose as individual fan entities.
